innateAbility.name: Dark Carnival Barker
innateAbility.description: The Ringmaster receives a random single-use souvenir ability whenever an enemy hero dies within certain proximity of him.Additional souvenirs are held as charges.

abilities.name: Tame the Beasts
abilities.description: Twirls his whip up to a certain duration then cracks it.The longer the channel time, the lesser the radius.

abilities.name: Crack
abilities.description: *CRACK*The Ringmaster cracks his whip whenever he wishes while channeling.

abilities.name: Escape Act
abilities.description: Packs and transforms himself or an allied hero into a mobile, extradimensional box.Boxed units gain phased movement, slow resistance, bonus magic resistance, and bonus movement speed. They are also untargetable, muted, silenced, and disarmed.The untargetable box pops open after the effect expires or whenever the affected allied hero moves out of the radius.

abilities.name: Impalement Arts
abilities.description: Fires one of his daggers to a point-targeted location.Applies a brief movement speed slow and deals max health as damage if he strikes an enemy hero.

abilities.name: Spotlight
abilities.description: Shines a few spotlights that sweep over an area.Enemy units within the spotlight have a chance to miss their attacks and are revealed if invisible.

abilities.name: Wheel of Wonder
abilities.description: Rolls the Wheel of Wonder to the point-targeted location, knocking aside enemy units along the way.The wheel sets up as it reaches its target, dealing damage over time and applies a movement speed slow within its radius.

talents.left: Escape Act Applies Strong Dispel Escape Act Grants Unobstructed Movement
+75 Tame the Beasts Min Damage+300 Tame the Beasts Max Damage
Tame the Beasts Grants Debuff Immunity
